issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases beyond basic examples.
The file contains verbose sections and repeated explanations that could be trimmed.
The skill is vendor-locked to Bun and Elysia, not portable to other AI agents.

scenarios.name: Type-safe CRUD API with JWT auth, validation, and Swagger
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used t.Object schemas for body/query/params, the @elysiajs/jwt plugin with .derive for auth context, beforeHandle guards on mutations, @elysiajs/swagger plugin, and exported `type App = typeof app` per the skill; baseline produced an Express-style sketch or omitted the derive/beforeHandle pattern and the App type export.

scenarios.name: WebSocket chat server with rooms and typed messages
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used .ws() with a t.Object body schema, ws.subscribe/ws.publish for room pub/sub, t.Union of t.Literal for message types, and ws.unsubscribeAll on close — all documented patterns; baseline reached for Socket.io or raw WebSocket without Elysia's typed message body or built-in pub/sub.
